creator: dudleyi@yahoo.com
text:
Created attachment 256335
various outputs

When booting into FreeBSD (installer, live system, or installed system) the keyboard for the aforementioned system does not work in terminal, but is recognized by the Operating System. Plugging in a USB keyboard/mouse circumvents the issue, but is not preferred for a laptop device.

I believe the PRiMAX HP FY23 OMEN 16 KBM is the keyboard/mouse set that is of target. I might be wrong.

kldstat, usbconfig, and pciconf attached.
